title: A Day at the Park
prompt: Write a short story about a fun day at the park with your friends.

title: My Magic Pet
prompt: Imagine you have a magic pet. What can it do? What adventures do you have together?

title: Rainy Day
prompt: It is raining outside. Describe what you do at home and how you feel.

title: My Favorite Food
prompt: Write about your favorite food. What does it taste like? When do you eat it?

title: A Trip to the Zoo
prompt: You visit a zoo for the first time. Describe the animals you see and your favorite one.

title: The Friendly Robot
prompt: You find a friendly robot in your backyard. What does it look like? What do you do together?

title: My Best Birthday
prompt: Write about your best birthday party ever, real or imaginary. What made it special?

title: Under the Sea
prompt: Imagine you can breathe underwater. Describe what you see and who you meet in the ocean.

title: The Secret Garden
prompt: You discover a hidden garden behind a wall. What grows there? What happens when you enter?

title: My Superhero Day
prompt: If you had superpowers for one day, what would you do? How would you help people?

title: A Letter to My Future Self
prompt: Write a letter to yourself 10 years from now. What do you hope for?

title: Camping Adventure
prompt: You go camping in the forest with your family. What do you do? What sounds do you hear at night?

title: The Lost Kitten
prompt: You find a tiny kitten on your way home. Write about how you help it and what happens next.

title: Snow Day Fun
prompt: School is closed because of snow! Describe your perfect snow day from morning to night.

title: My Dream Treehouse
prompt: Describe your dream treehouse. What does it look like? What is inside?

title: The Talking Animal
prompt: One morning your pet starts talking! What does it say? What adventures do you have?

title: A New Student
prompt: A new student joins your class from another country. How do you make them feel welcome?

title: Space Explorer
prompt: You are chosen to fly to Mars! Describe your journey and what you find when you land.

title: The Time Machine
prompt: You build a time machine! Do you go to the past or the future? What do you see?

title: My Favorite Season
prompt: What is your favorite season and why? Describe how the world looks and what you do.

title: Helping at Home
prompt: Write about a time you helped your family with something. How did it make you feel?

title: The Magical Library
prompt: You visit a library where the books come alive! What story jumps out of its pages?
